sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: test f values (0 to 1 in increments) calculating HPR for each P&L outcome, select f maximizing geometric mean across all scenarios. Requires historical P&L distribution, worst-case loss, and Equation (3.30) HPR conversion.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by testing multiple f values (from 0 to 1 in increments) and calculating the Holding Period Return (HPR) for each P&L outcome at that f value, selecting the f that produces the optimal geometric mean across all scenarios.
